control.description: Area of the dialog for ports
Active port list. Length should fit 13 listitems (12 controllers and one "controller disconnected" indicator).
Area of the dialog for player controllers
Controller name as reported by the driver
control.label: $INFO[ListItem.Label]

control.description: Controller list which indicates the port a player's controller is connected to. Length should fit 13 listitems (12 controller items and one "input disabled" item).
Disc manager menu. The content is a template from which the menu items are generated.

item.description: "Selected disc" item. Label2 is the inserted disc's label (or "No disc" if no disc is inserted).
item.label: $LOCALIZE[35273]

item.description: "Eject"/"Insert" item. Label2 is the tray status (only "Tray open" is shown).
item.label: $LOCALIZE[35275]

item.description: "Add" item for adding another disc to the disc playlist
item.label: $LOCALIZE[15019]

item.description: "Delete" item for deleting a disc from the disc playlist
item.label: $LOCALIZE[117]

item.description: "Resume game" item for resuming the game
item.label: $LOCALIZE[35277]

control.label: [B]Scores can only be submitted in Hardcore Mode[/B]
[B]Scores can only be submitted in Hardcore Mode[/B]
